programs.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark
programs.desc: Ancient documents and legends suggest that the Ark of the Covenant may have been stolen by Roman legions and hidden in Rome; a team of archaeologists explore mystery cults and ancient catacombs to uncover the truth behind this treasured artifact.

programs.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark
programs.desc: Ancient scriptures describe the Ark of the Covenant as possessing an almighty force with the capacity to kill; now, an expert team of archaeologists trace the ark's destructive path in a quest to discover the truth behind its mythical power.

programs.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark
programs.desc: According to biblical scripture, the prophet Jeremiah hides the Ark of the Covenant at a remote location for safekeeping; a team of archaeologists investigate sacred sites and ancient tombs to retrace the possible journey of this lost artifact.

programs.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark
programs.desc: The holy order of the Knights Templar are believed to have located and seized the Ark of the Covenant centuries ago; now, expert historians follow the trail of this elusive order to uncover the truth behind this sacred relic's mysterious journey.

programs.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark
programs.desc: Some allege that the Ark of the Covenant was stolen by King Solomon's son and taken to Ethiopia thousands of years ago; now, archaeologists investigate new, mysterious leads to uncover the secrets behind this lost relic's elusive journey.

programs.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark
programs.desc: According to biblical scripture, the prophet Jeremiah hides the Ark of the Covenant at a remote location for safekeeping; a team of archaeologists investigate sacred sites and ancient tombs to retrace the possible journey of this lost artifact.
